use std::sync::OnceLock;
use tree_sitter::{Parser, Query, QueryCursor};

static FUNCTION_QUERY: OnceLock<Query> = OnceLock::new();
static IDENTIFIER_QUERY: OnceLock<Query> = OnceLock::new();

fn get_function_query() -> &'static Query {
    FUNCTION_QUERY.get_or_init(|| {
        let language = tree_sitter_rust::LANGUAGE.into();
        Query::new(&language, "(function_item name: (identifier) @name)").unwrap()
    })
}

fn get_identifier_query() -> &'static Query {
    IDENTIFIER_QUERY.get_or_init(|| {
        let language = tree_sitter_rust::LANGUAGE.into();
        Query::new(&language, "(identifier) @id").unwrap()
    })
}

fn find_functions(source: &str, tree: &tree_sitter::Tree) -> Vec<String> {
    let query = get_function_query();
    let mut cursor = QueryCursor::new();
    cursor
        .matches(query, tree.root_node(), source.as_bytes())
        .map(|m| {
            let node = m.captures[0].node;
            source[node.start_byte()..node.end_byte()].to_string()
        })
        .collect()
}

fn find_identifiers(source: &str, tree: &tree_sitter::Tree) -> Vec<String> {
    let query = get_identifier_query();
    let mut cursor = QueryCursor::new();
    cursor
        .matches(query, tree.root_node(), source.as_bytes())
        .map(|m| {
            let node = m.captures[0].node;
            source[node.start_byte()..node.end_byte()].to_string()
        })
        .collect()
}
